/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_total_demo__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo/libros2_total_demo__python.so CMakeFiles/ros2_total_demo__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo/msg/_object_pose_s.c.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64:/home/rm/ros2_ws/src/ros2_total_demo/build/ros2_total_demo:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libros2_total_demo__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
